% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
% travelguide.tex  —  Pandoc LaTeX template
% Place at: .github/templates/travelguide.tex
%
% Style: editorial travel guide — black & white only, wide sidenote margin,
%        full-page chapter titles, framed inserts, footnotes as handwritten
%        sidenotes in the right margin.
%
% Requires in conversion-config.yml:
%   defaults:
%     engine:    pdflatex
%     template:  .github/templates/travelguide.tex
%     pandoc_args: ["--top-level-division=chapter"]
% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


% ── Document class ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% `oneside`   — no alternating margins; all sidenotes go right
% `openany`   — chapters can start on any page (not just odd)
\documentclass[
  $if(fontsize)$$fontsize$$else$12pt$endif$,
  a4paper,
  oneside,
  openany
]{book}


% ── Page geometry ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Wide right margin houses the sidenotes.
% A4 = 210mm.  left 27 + text 118 + sep 6 + marginpar 46 + right 13 = 210mm
\usepackage[
  top    = 27mm,
  bottom = 32mm,
  left   = 27mm,
  right  = 13mm,
  marginparwidth = 43mm,
  marginparsep   = 6mm,
]{geometry}


% ── Font stack ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
$if(fontfamily)$
\usepackage{$fontfamily$}
$else$
\usepackage{lmodern}          % clean default serif
$endif$
\usepackage{microtype}        % better justification and kerning
\usepackage{calligra}         % handwritten font for sidenotes
                              % (texlive-fonts-extra)


% ── Colour — pure black and white, no greys ────────────────────────────────────
% Only black (#000000) and white (#FFFFFF) are used throughout.
\usepackage{xcolor}
\colorlet{ink}{black}
\colorlet{paper}{white}


% ── Sidenotes — footnotes redirected to the right margin ───────────────────────
\usepackage{marginnote}
\usepackage{ragged2e}         % \RaggedRight inside margin notes

% Counter mirrors the footnote counter so numbering is continuous.
\newcounter{sidenote}[chapter]

\renewcommand{\footnote}[1]{%
  \refstepcounter{sidenote}%
  % Superscript marker in the main text
  \textsuperscript{\footnotesize\thesidenote}%
  % Matching note in the margin, set in calligra
  \marginnote{%
    \RaggedRight
    \textsuperscript{\scriptsize\thesidenote}\,%
    {\calligra\small #1}%
  }%
}

% Keep \marginnote flush with the text column
\renewcommand*{\marginfont}{\normalfont\small}


% ── Drop caps (optional — use \lettrine{L}{etter} in a chapter opening) ─────────
\usepackage{lettrine}
\setcounter{DefaultLines}{3}
\renewcommand{\LettrineFontHook}{\bfseries}


% ── Chapter title page — large, centred, double rule ───────────────────────────
\usepackage{titlesec}

% Remove the default "Chapter N" label — show only the destination name.
\titleformat{\chapter}[display]
  {\normalfont\centering}%          global format for label + title block
  {}%                               label (chapter number) — intentionally blank
  {0pt}%                            separation between label and title
  % ↓ before-code: injected above the title text
  {%
    \vspace*{0.21\textheight}%
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{2.2pt}\\[-1pt]%
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[1.4em]%
    \fontsize{44}{52}\selectfont\bfseries%
  }%
  % ↓ after-code: injected below the title text
  [%
    \\[1.4em]%
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[-1pt]%
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{2.2pt}%
    \vspace{0.21\textheight}%
  ]

% Suppress the extra vertical space book class adds before \chapter
\titlespacing*{\chapter}{0pt}{-54pt}{0pt}


% ── Section headings ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Section  (## in Markdown with --top-level-division=chapter)
\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\large\bfseries}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
  [\vspace{3pt}\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.8pt}]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{18pt}{8pt}

% Subsection  (### in Markdown)
\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\normalsize\bfseries\itshape}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{12pt}{4pt}

% Subsubsection  (#### in Markdown)
\titleformat{\subsubsection}
  {\normalfont\normalsize\itshape}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{8pt}{2pt}


% ── Paragraph spacing ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{parskip}
\setlength{\parskip}{5pt plus 1pt}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}


% ── Insert / callout boxes — double-rule frame, white background ────────────────
% Used by the `insert` type in conversion-config.yml.
% The outer thick rule + inner thin rule reads as a classic editorial box.
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}

\newtcolorbox{insertbox}{
  enhanced,
  breakable,
  colback  = white,
  colframe = black,
  boxrule  = 1.8pt,
  arc      = 0pt,
  left     = 11pt, right  = 11pt,
  top      = 9pt,  bottom = 9pt,
  % Inner thin rule drawn as an overlay, 4pt inside the outer frame
  overlay  = {
    \draw[line width=0.5pt, black]
      ([xshift=4pt, yshift=-4pt]frame.south west)
      rectangle
      ([xshift=-4pt, yshift=4pt]frame.north east);
  },
}


% ── Running headers and footers ────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% Left header: current chapter title (auto-updated by \chapter)
\fancyhead[L]{%
  \small\itshape\nouppercase{\leftmark}%
}
% Right header: document title from front matter / config
\fancyhead[R]{%
  \small$if(title)$$title$$endif$%
}
% Centre footer: page number
\fancyfoot[C]{\small\thepage}

% Chapter-opening pages use `plain` style — just the page number
\fancypagestyle{plain}{
  \fancyhf{}
  \fancyfoot[C]{\small\thepage}
  \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
}


% ── Images ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{graphicx}
\setkeys{Gin}{width=\linewidth, keepaspectratio}


% ── Tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}


% ── Code ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{listings}
\lstset{
  basicstyle      = \small\ttfamily,
  breaklines      = true,
  frame           = single,
  framesep        = 4pt,
  rulecolor       = \color{black},
  backgroundcolor = \color{white},
  numbers         = none,
  tabsize         = 2,
}


% ── Lists ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{enumitem}
\setlist{noitemsep, topsep=4pt, leftmargin=1.4em}


% ── Links — rendered in pure black so they are print-safe ──────────────────────
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
  colorlinks = true,
  linkcolor  = black,
  urlcolor   = black,
  citecolor  = black,
  pdftitle   = {$if(title)$$title$$endif$},
  pdfauthor  = {$if(author)$$author$$endif$},
}


% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
% DOCUMENT BODY
% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

\begin{document}

% ── Half-title / cover page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
$if(title)$
\begin{titlepage}
  \thispagestyle{empty}
  \vspace*{\fill}
  \begin{center}
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{2.2pt}\\[-1pt]
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[2.5em]
    {\fontsize{52}{62}\selectfont\bfseries $title$}\\[2em]
    $if(subtitle)${\Large\itshape $subtitle$}\\[1.5em]$endif$
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[-1pt]
    \noindent\rule{\textwidth}{2.2pt}\\[2.5em]
    $if(author)${\large $author$}\\[0.8em]$endif$
    $if(date)${\small $date$}$endif$
  \end{center}
  \vspace*{\fill}
\end{titlepage}
$endif$

% ── Table of contents ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
$if(toc)$
{
  \setlength{\parskip}{2pt}
  \tableofcontents
  \clearpage
}
$endif$

% ── Main content ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
$body$

\end{document}
